title: nassella airoides
intro: Nassella airoides, also known as Crested Wheatgrass, is a perennial grass native to the mountainous regions of the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of Nassella airoides include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and exhibiting antioxidant properties. The plant can be prepared for herbal use through teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential interactions.
